infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GNB Motors needs your location while you are on duty so managers can see your live driver position.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GNB Motors needs Always location access only when you choose Always sharing for on-duty driver tracking.
